site.title: Iqbal Wijonarko
site.tagline: From Technology to Strategy | Questrom School of Business

about.greeting: Hi! I'm Iqbal and I'm an Indonesian based in 📍 Boston, MA
paragraphs: I am a strategic problem solver with a unique ability to translate complex data into significant business growth. My professional journey is defined by my transition from software engineering to strategy, where I now combine my technical expertise with a robust foundation in strategic analysis to drive high-impact results.

My experience has a proven track record of delivering outsized outcomes, from structuring market entry for an {{$851B}} sector that projected {{3x}} faster adoption to implementing strategic fees that helped a team exceed its revenue targets by up to {{152%}}. I excel at leading cross-functional teams and orchestrating initiatives that resulted in a {{55%}} growth in active users and an expansion of services to over 20,000+ merchants.
I am eager to discuss how this blend of analytical rigor and a bias for action can contribute to solving your most challenging client needs.
Let's talk strategy and drive impact together 🚀
about.highlightNote: Text wrapped in {{double braces}} renders with a yellow marker highlight.

education.detail: Questrom School of Business - Boston University

projects.name: GetAway Venture
projects.description: Built a venture plan targeting the $16B points market. Modeled $21M in revenue by Year 8 and formulated a $3.4M seed stage pitch.

projects.name: Hasta Dwiyustama Company Website
projects.description: Directed PT. Hasta Dwiyustama's website development using Next.js and SCSS, achieving a 40% increase in user engagement.

projects.name: Laywook
projects.description: Create a system that streamlines the economic management of cooperatives by recording all member savings and transactions comprehensively.

projects.name: Biotis Reporting System
projects.description: Biotis Employee Reporting System (EARS), a task management tool revolutionizing operations across a vast agricultural distribution network.

projects.name: COMPFEST 12
projects.description: Led a 39-member event division to execute the Biggest IT Event Held by Students in Indonesia, delivering a high-impact nationwide showcase.

projects.name: World Angklung Day in San Fransisco
projects.description: Celebrate 15 years of UNESCO Angklung recognition with a U.S.-Indonesia showcase of music, culture, and collaboration.
